```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement load testing for performance baseline"
---
# Load Testing Setup
## Task
Set up load testing for performance baseline.
## Requirements
1. Define load test scenarios (steady state, spike, soak). 2. Use load testing tool (k6, Locust, JMeter).
3. Establish performance baselines. 4. Run in CI for regression detection.
5. Report results with percentile latencies.
## Constraints
- Test against staging. Define pass/fail thresholds. Report p50/p95/p99 latencies.
## Success Criteria
- Baselines established. Regressions detected. Results in CI. Percentiles reported.
```
